---
title: "day 05 - experimental"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
```


### fourth 

```{r}


df_orbital_example <- tibble::tibble(
  airport = c("SBGR", "SBGL", "SBBR", "LPPT", "LEMD", "LFPG", "EHAM"),
  region = c("Brazil", "Brazil", "Brazil", "Europe", "Europe", "Europe", "Europe"),
  movements = c(25500, 18800, 15700, 21500, 33500, 36500, 34800),
  arrival_punctuality = c(80.4, 82.6, 85.7, 79.3, 76.9, 78.5, 81.2)
)

```


```{r}

plot_orbital_operational_map <- function(
  data,
  airport_var = "airport",
  region_var = "region",
  traffic_var = "movements",
  punctuality_var = "arrival_punctuality",
  punctuality_target = 85,
  title = "Orbital Operational Map",
  subtitle = "Airport position by traffic volume and punctuality gap"
) {
  
  # Validate required columns
required_cols <- c(airport_var, region_var, traffic_var, punctuality_var)
  
missing_cols <- required_cols[!required_cols %in% names(data)]
  
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop(
      paste(
        "Missing required columns:",
        paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")
      )
    )
  }
  
  # Prepare dataset
df <- data |>
    dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(required_cols)) |>
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(.data[[airport_var]]),
      !is.na(.data[[region_var]]),
      !is.na(.data[[traffic_var]]),
      !is.na(.data[[punctuality_var]])
    ) |>
    dplyr::distinct() |>
    dplyr::arrange(.data[[region_var]], dplyr::desc(.data[[traffic_var]])) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      performance_gap = pmax(0, punctuality_target - .data[[punctuality_var]]),
      orbit_radius = 1 + performance_gap,
      angle = seq(0, 2 * pi, length.out = dplyr::n() + 1)[1:dplyr::n()],
      x = orbit_radius * cos(angle),
      y = orbit_radius * sin(angle)
    )
  
  # Create ring data
ring_values <- c(1, 3, 5, 7, 9)
  
ring_data <- tibble::tibble(
    ring = ring_values
  )
  
  # Build plot
p <- ggplot2::ggplot() +
    ggplot2::geom_path(
      data = purrr::map_dfr(
        ring_values,
        function(r) {
          tibble::tibble(
            ring = r,
            theta = seq(0, 2 * pi, length.out = 300),
            x = r * cos(theta),
            y = r * sin(theta)
          )
        }
      ),
      ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y, group = ring),
      color = "grey80",
      linewidth = 0.5
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(
      data = df,
      ggplot2::aes(
        x = x,
        y = y,
        size = .data[[traffic_var]],
        color = .data[[region_var]]
      ),
      alpha = 0.9
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      size = 5,
      shape = 21,
      fill = "white",
      color = "black",
      stroke = 1.2
    ) +
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
      data = df,
      ggplot2::aes(
        x = x,
        y = y,
        label = .data[[airport_var]],
        color = .data[[region_var]]
      ),
      size = 4.2,
      box.padding = 0.9,
      point.padding = 2.5,
      segment.alpha = 0.5,
      force = 4 ,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    ggplot2::annotate(
      "text",
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      label = "Target",
      fontface = "bold",
      size = 4
    )  +
    ggplot2::scale_size_continuous(
      range = c(5, 16),
      name = "Movements"
    ) +
    ggplot2::coord_equal() +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = title,
      subtitle = subtitle,
      color = "Region"
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_void(base_size = 13) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      legend.position = "right",
      plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold", size = 18),
      plot.subtitle = ggplot2::element_text(size = 12)
    )
  
  return(p)
}

```


```{r}

preview_plot <- function(plot, width = 12, height = 8) {
  grDevices::dev.new(width = width, height = height)
  print(plot)
}

preview_plot(
  plot_orbital_operational_map(df_orbital_example),
  width = 12,
  height = 10
)

```


```{r}

p <- plot_orbital_operational_map(
  data = df_orbital_example,
  punctuality_target = 85
)

ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = "orbital_map.png",
  plot = p,
  width = 12,
  height = 10,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)






```




+
    ggplot2::annotate(
      "text",
      x = ring_values,
      y = 0,
      label = paste0("Gap ", ring_values - 1),
      color = "grey45",
      size = 3.3,
      vjust = -0.6
    )
